message:
chore(deps): bump ftui workspace crates 0.2.0 -> 0.2.1

Update lockfile for ftui ecosystem bump across all 11 sub-crates:
ftui, ftui-backend, ftui-core, ftui-extras, ftui-harness, ftui-i18n,
ftui-layout, ftui-render, ftui-runtime, ftui-style, ftui-text.

This is a patch-level bump with no breaking API changes; it brings
rendering fixes and the Cell::from_char constructor used by the new
splitter handle rendering code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2329,7 +2329,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "ftui"
-version = "0.2.0"
+version = "0.2.1"
 dependencies = [
  "ftui-core",
  "ftui-extras",
@@ -2343,15 +2343,15 @@ dependencies = [

+version = "0.2.1"

  "ftui-core",
  "ftui-render",
